interface: Atlas Administration API v2 — Clusters resource (ClusterDescription20240805)

auth.scheme: Authorization: Bearer <service-account access token> on every request

media_types.note: Atlas versions each operation independently: the latest published version of GET /clusters/{name} is 2024-08-05 while POST/PATCH use 2024-10-23. Writes send the dated type as BOTH Accept and Content-Type. A wrong or missing version date gets 406 Not Acceptable.

create.body: ClusterDescription20240805 subset: name, clusterType, mongoDBMajorVersion, replicationSpecs
create.conflict: 409 ApiError, e.g. errorCode DUPLICATE_CLUSTER_NAME (fixture value; 409 conflict is the documented response class)

update.body: only the fields being changed; replicationSpecs is replaced as a whole array

cluster_payload.replicationSpecs: one object per shard (one for a replica set): {zoneName, regionConfigs[]}; server adds readOnly id and zoneId
cluster_payload.regionConfig: {providerName AWS|AZURE|GCP|TENANT, regionName, priority, electableSpecs{instanceSize, nodeCount, diskSizeGB}}

state_semantics.IDLE: no changes in flight — all requested changes applied
state_semantics.DELETING: cluster being removed — terminal for a reconcile that wants the cluster present
